attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,
BILLING_MODEL,
CHARGE_TYPE,
CREATED_BY,
CAST(CAST(CREATED_ON AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) CREATED_ON,
DURATION,
EXT_LIST_PRICE,
FINAL_DISCOUNT,
FINAL_NET_PRICE,
QUOTE_ID,
LINE_TYPE,
NON_STANDARD_DISC,
OBJECT_ID,
OFFER_TYPE,
PART_NUMBER,
PREPAY_TERM,
PRICING_TERM,
QUANTITY,
CAST(CAST(SUBSCRIPTION_END_DATE
 AS VARCHAR(19)) AS DATE)SUBSCRIPTION_END_DATE, 
CAST(CAST(SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE
 AS VARCHAR(19)) AS DATE)SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE, 
UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
UNIT_NET_PRICE,
UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT,
UPDATED_BY,
CAST(CAST(UPDATED_ON AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) UPDATED_ON,
PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID,
CAST(CAST(EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) 
FROM
$$ETLVWDB.ST_SI_REVCLOUD_QUOTE_LINES
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY OBJECT_ID ORDER BY 
CAST(CAST(EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0))  DESC)=1
WHERE CAST(CAST(EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0))> Cast('$$LastExtractDate' AS TIMESTAMP(0))

SELECT      
      DURATION ,
      EXT_LIST_PRICE ,
      FINAL_DISCOUNT,
      FINAL_NET_PRICE,
      QUOTE_ID ,
      LINE_TYPE ,
      NON_STANDARD_DISC ,
      OBJECT_ID ,
      OFFER_TYPE ,
      PART_NUMBER,
      PREPAY_TERM ,
      PRICING_TERM,
      QUANTITY ,
      SUBSCRIPTION_END_DATE ,
      SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE ,
      UNIT_LIST_PRICE ,
      UNIT_NET_PRICE ,
      UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT ,
      PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID ,
      EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
current_timestamp(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM
FROM $$STGDB.ST_REVCLOUD_QUOTE_LINES ST
WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_REVCLOUD_QUOTE_LINES EL 
WHERE ST.OBJECT_ID=EL.OBJECT_ID)

SELECT 
EX.ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,
EX.BILLING_MODEL,
EX.CHARGE_TYPE,
EX.CREATED_BY,
EX.CREATED_ON,
EX.DURATION,
EX.EXT_LIST_PRICE,
EX.FINAL_DISCOUNT,
EX.FINAL_NET_PRICE,
EX.QUOTE_ID,
EX.LINE_TYPE,
EX.NON_STANDARD_DISC,
EX.OBJECT_ID,
EX.OFFER_TYPE,
EX.PART_NUMBER,
EX.PREPAY_TERM,
EX.PRICING_TERM,
EX.QUANTITY,
EX.SUBSCRIPTION_END_DATE,
EX.SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE,
EX.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
EX.UNIT_NET_PRICE,
EX.UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT,
EX.UPDATED_BY,
EX.UPDATED_ON,
EX.PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID,
EX.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
EX.LINE_NUMBER
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_REVCLOUD_QUOTE_LINES EX
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_REVCLOUD_QUOTE_LINES ST
WHERE ST.OBJECT_ID=EX.OBJECT_ID
)
